top3.sql:
WITH italian_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.cust_id,
        SUM(s.amount_sold - co.unit_cost * s.quantity_sold) AS profit_dec_2021
    FROM sales s
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co_country ON c.country_id = co_country.country_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN costs co ON s.prod_id = co.prod_id AND s.time_id = co.time_id AND s.channel_id = co.channel_id AND s.promo_id = co.promo_id
    WHERE co_country.country_name = 'Italy'
      AND ...

WITH italian_sales_dec2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.cust_id,
        SUM(s.amount_sold - c.unit_cost * s.quantity_sold) AS profit
    FROM sales s
    JOIN customers cu ON s.cust_id = cu.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON cu.country_id = co.country_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN costs c ON s.prod_id = c.prod_id AND s.time_id = c.time_id AND s.channel_id = c.channel_id AND s.promo_id = c.promo_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'Italy'
      AND t.calendar_month_desc = '2021-12...
